headline: BlackRock® Canada Announces Final April Cash Distributions for the iShares® Premium Money Market ETF
summary: TORONTO, April 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlackRock Asset Management Canada Limited (“BlackRock Canada”), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BlackRock, Inc. (NYSE: BLK), today announced the final April 2026 cash distributions for the iShares Premium Money Market ETF. Unitholders of record on April 27, 2026 will receive cash distributions payable on April 30, 2026. headline: BlackRock Backs Bezos Project Prometheus While Advancing AI Agent Vision
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) is participating as a key investor in Jeff Bezos's Project Prometheus, a planned $10b fundraising round. Project Prometheus is focused on large scale technology development, with BlackRock stepping in outside its usual asset management activities. At the same time, BlackRock engineering leaders are publicly outlining a vision for AI agents playing a central role in future asset management.
